name: Pork Tenderloin with Hawiian Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the pork broth, brown mustard, yellow mustard, horseradish, ketchup, brown sugar, and minced garlic. Cook until the mixture simmers.
2. Reduce the stock and keep it warm.
3. Grill the pork tenderloin, turning occasionally to prevent burning while brushing with the sauce.
4. Remove the pork from the grill when it reaches an internal temperature of 170°F (about 1 hour on low heat).
5. Grill the vegetables and pineapple during the last half of the cooking time.
6. Serve the meat with the grilled vegetables and pineapple.
